title: Stylistic Variation
description: Matching tone, vocabulary, and rhythm to audience and purpose.
summary_pt_br: Variação estilística: jornalismo (curto), acadêmico (longo), casual (contrações), literário (metáfora).

scenes.subtitle_en: Matching tone, vocabulary, and rhythm to audience and purpose.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Variação estilística: jornalismo (curto), acadêmico (longo), casual (contrações), literário (metáfora).

scenes.text_en: Matching tone, vocabulary, and rhythm to audience and purpose. Today's focus: stylistic variation. She ran fast. (journalistic)
scenes.text_pt: Variação estilística: jornalismo (curto), acadêmico (longo), casual (contrações), literário (metáfora). Foco de hoje: stylistic variation. Corrida rápida. Curta.

scenes.title: Stylistic Variation
scenes.body_en: Journalism: short, active, punchy. Academic: longer, passive, nominal. Casual: contractions, phrasal verbs. Literary: metaphor, rhythm, imagery. Variation shows range.
scenes.body_pt: Variação estilística: jornalismo (curto), acadêmico (longo), casual (contrações), literário (metáfora).

examples.en: Her velocity, measured across three trials, exceeded the previous record. (academic)
examples.pt: Sua velocidade, medida em três testes... (acadêmico)

examples.en: She flew down the track like the wind had given her permission. (literary)
examples.pt: Voou pela pista como se o vento permitisse. (literário)

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: Her velocity, measured across three trials, exceeded the previous record. (academic)
I haven't heard anything about that.
exercise.explanation: The correct sentence is: "Her velocity, measured across three trials, exceeded the previous record. (academic)"
exercise.hint_pt_br: Sua velocidade, medida em três testes... (acadêmico)

exercise.explanation: Five key terms from the lesson. Match each English word to its Portuguese meaning.

scenes.title: Stylistic Variation — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre stylistic variation. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Rewrite 'She ran fast' in journalistic style.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Her performance exceeded all prior benchmarks.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: She flew past the clock as if time owed her.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: You should've seen her — she was flying!

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Five voices, one athlete — that's range.

scenes.title: The same sentence, five voices
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, detalhes e sua opinião. O professor vai ler e comentar.
scenes.prompt_en: Rewrite a short scene in three different styles. Use at least three style shifts.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Resumo curto com quem falou, o que disseram e sua opinião.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Kumar asked the class to describe one moment — a runner crossing the finish line — in four voices.

paragraphs.speaker: Kumar
paragraphs.en: Start simple. 'She broke the record Tuesday' is a headline. Short, active, news-ready.

paragraphs.speaker: Student
paragraphs.en: An academic might write: 'Her time on Tuesday eclipsed the standing record by one full second.'

paragraphs.speaker: Student
paragraphs.en: A novelist might say: 'She crossed the line like gravity had forgotten her entirely.'

paragraphs.speaker: Kumar
paragraphs.en: Same truth, four rooms, four audiences — style is the outfit your sentence wears to each of them.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Writers, Kumar said, spend their first decade learning grammar and the rest of their lives learning style.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "Stylistic Variation". Matching tone, vocabulary, and rhythm to audience and purpose. She ran fast. (journalistic) Her velocity, measured across three trials, exceeded the previous record. (academic) Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: Prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "Stylistic Variation". I liked it because it was clear and useful. See you next time!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule from last year

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para continuar praticando. Salve os links e volte sempre.
